allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/portfolio_data.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table''""\); print\(cursor.fetchall\(\)\); cursor.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM daily_prices''\); print\(''daily_prices rows:'', cursor.fetchone\(\)\); cursor.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM tickers_meta''\); print\(''tickers_meta rows:'', cursor.fetchone\(\)\); cursor.execute\(''PRAGMA table_info\(daily_prices\)''\); print\(''daily_prices schema:'', cursor.fetchall\(\)\); cursor.execute\(''PRAGMA table_info\(tickers_meta\)''\); print\(''tickers_meta schema:'', cursor.fetchall\(\)\); conn.close\(\)")
